en: Developed custom websites, event platforms, and e-commerce solutions for agency clients
Built custom WordPress themes and plugins focused on performance, scalability, and maintainability
Developed front-end interfaces using React, Astro, SCSS, and JavaScript (ES6+)
Created interactive and animated experiences using Three.js and WebGL
Developed a mobile application using React Native (Expo)
Implemented email automation and CRM workflows using Brevo

Développement front-end avec React, Astro, SCSS, JavaScript Vanilla et jQuery
Création d'expériences interactives et animées avec Three.js et WebGL
Conception et optimisation de bases de données (MySQL)
Développement d'une application mobile avec React Native (Expo)
Automatisation emailing et intégration CRM via Brevo

en: Led 3D conception and production of in-store brand corners for clients including Adidas, Levi's, Under Armour, Reebok

Integrated websites and digital experiences for clients using WordPress
Managed the full production cycle: 3D modeling, technical drawings, print-ready files, and on-site installation
Coordinated internal teams and external partners
